parsed_generation.narration: A yellow New York City taxi driving through Times Square, street-level view. In the first shot, the taxi sits in the frame with neon signs surrounding the street, camera static to establish the iconic crossroads. In the second shot, the taxi moves forward at eye level with medium framing as the billboards blur and lights reflect off the taxi’s surface. In the third shot, a close-up push-in captures the taxi’s front, the color vivid against Times Square’s glow, illustrating how a single vehicle threads the city’s energy through this famous junction.
